name: Steamed Pearl Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the uncooked rice and 1 1/2 cups cold water. Let stand for 2 hours. Drain the rice and place on paper towels to dry.
2. Combine the mushroom caps and 1/2 cup hot water; let stand for 15 minutes. Remove and discard the mushroom stems, set aside.
3. Trim excess fat from the pork. Process the pork with a knife blade for 1 minute or until finely chopped.
4. Add the reserved mushrooms, egg, and remaining ingredients to the processed pork. Blend until well combined.
5. Shape the pork mixture into 16 (1-inch) balls. Roll each ball in the reserved rice.
6. Arrange the balls in a 10 x 6 x 2 inch baking pan. Place the dish on a rack in a roasting pan.
7. Pour water into the roasting pan to a depth of 1 inch. Bring to a boil.
8. Cover the roasting pan and reduce heat to medium. Steam for 20 minutes. Serve immediately.
